summary: Lead starts M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 after M6 exit closure entered origin/main. This is a planning-only task to create the M7 Beta content and quality task DAG. No M7 implementation or content lock begins in this start checkpoint.

tests_run.result: No whitespace errors before systems route.

Do not create M7 implementation work before task graph review and integration.
